publishedAbstract: * After NFS has been enabled in ODF [1], it is required to remove NFS from ODF. [1] https://docs.redhat.com/en/documentation/red_hat_openshift_data_foundation/4.17/html-single/managing_and_allocating_storage_resources/index#enabling-the-nfs-feature_rhodf
publishedTitle: How to remove NFS from ODF
